zh.lifeSummary: 當Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia於從1296年到1306年出生在烏克蘭Івано-ФранківськаГалицький районГалич時，她的父親Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik49歲，母親Princess Eufemia of Kujavia40歲。她於大約1320年與Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver在Российская империяТверская結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1365年4月在Российская империяПсковская губернияПсковский уездПсков。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia于从1296年到1306年出生在乌克兰Івано-ФранківськаГалицький районГалич时，她的父亲Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik49岁，母亲Princess Eufemia of Kujavia40岁。她于大约1320年与Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver在Российская империяТверская结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1365年4月在Российская империяПсковская губернияПсковский уездПсков。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Galicia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Juan, Manuel, Juana, Mario, Miguel, Pedro, Rodolfo, Alicia, Arturo, Fidel.

Spanish: ethnic name from Galicia, a former kingdom, now an autonomous region of northwestern Spain. The name was created by Romans from the name of a people who lived in the south of the current Galicia, the Callaici or Gallaeci, probably of Celtic origin.

variants.name: Galizia
meanings: Italian: from the personal name Galizia, which is derived from the Italian name for Galicia, a historical region in Poland and Ukraine.
Hispanic and Portuguese (Brazil): variant of   Galicia  .

variants.name: Galiza
meanings: Hispanic (Philippines) and Portuguese: ethnic name for someone from the former kingdom of Galicia (see Galicia ), from its Portuguese and medieval Galician name Galiza.

nameMeanings.name: Anastasia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of the Greek male name Anastasios (a derivative of anastasis ‘resurrection’). It has always been popular in Eastern Europe, in honour of a 4th-century saint who was martyred at Sirmium in Dalmatia. It was also used occasionally in England in the Middle Ages and as late as the 17th century; more recently it has made a considerable comeback. One of the daughters of the last tsar of Russia bore this name. She was murdered by the Bolsheviks in 1918 , along with the rest of her family, but in 1920 a woman claiming to be the Romanov princess Anastasia came to public notice in Germany, and a film was later based on this story ( 1956 ).

nameMeanings.name: Sofiya
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sophia
meanings: From the Greek word meaning ‘wisdom’. The Eastern cult of  St Sophia  arose as a result of misinterpretation of the phrase Hagia Sophia ‘holy wisdom’ as if it meant ‘St Sophia’. The name became popular in England in the 17th and 18th centuries—the heroine of  Fielding's  novel Tom Jones (  1749 ) is called  Sophia Weston—and  has been increasing in popularity since the 1990s. In Scotland it has been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia was born from 1296 to 1306, in Halych, Halych, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine, her father, Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik, was 49 and her mother, Princess Eufemia of Kujavia, was 40. She married Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver about 1320, in Tver, Russian Empire. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. She died in April 1365, in Pskov, Pskov Uyezd, Pskov Guberniya, Russian Empire.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia est née du 1296 au 1306, à Halych, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine, son père, Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Princess Eufemia of Kujavia, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver environ 1320, à Tver, Empire russe. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en avril 1365, à Pskov, Pskovskiy Uyezd, Pskovskaya Guberniya, Empire russe.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia von 1296 bis 1306 in Halych, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ukraine geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik 49 und ihre Mutter Princess Eufemia of Kujavia 40. Sie hat um 1320 in Tver, Russisches Kaiserreich Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im April 1365 in Pskov, Pskovskiy Uyezd, Pskovskaya Guberniya, Russisches Kaiserreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia è nata il da 1296 a 1306 nel Halych, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucraina, sua padre, Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Princess Eufemia of Kujavia, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver circa 1320, nel Tver, Russisches Kaiserreich. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1365, nel Pskov, Pskovskiy Uyezd, Pskovskaya Guberniya, Russisches Kaiserreich.

ja.lifeSummary: Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galiciaがから1296年まで1306年にウクライナІвано-ФранківськаГалицький районГаличで生まれた時，父Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurikは49歳，母Princess Eufemia of Kujaviaは40歳であった。約1320年にРоссийская империяТверскаяでGroß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tverと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1365年4月にРоссийская империяПсковская губернияПсковский уездПсковで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia(이)가 1296년 부터 1306년 까지 우크라이나 Івано-Франківська Галицький район Галич에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princess Eufemia of Kujavia(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 대략 1320년 Российская империя Тверская에서 Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1365년 4월 Российская империя Псковская губерния Псковский уезд Псков에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia nasceu de 1296 a 1306, em Halych, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucrânia, seu pai, Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Princess Eufemia of Kujavia, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver aproximadamente 1320, em Tver, Russisches Kaiserreich. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em abril de 1365, em Pskov, Pskovskiy Uyezd, Pskovskaya Guberniya, Russisches Kaiserreich.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia родилась с 1296 по 1306 в местности Галич, Галицкий район, Ивано-Франковская, Украина, её отцу по имени Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Princess Eufemia of Kujavia, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver около 1320 г. в местности Тверская, Российская империя. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла апрель 1365 г. в местности Псков, Псковский уезд, Псковская губерния, Российская империя.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Grand Duchess Anastasia Sofiya Michailovichevna of Galicia nació desde 1296 hasta 1306, en Halych, Halytsʹkyy Rayon, Ivano-Frankivsk, Ucrania, su papá, Grand Prince of Kiev Yurii I. Levovich Rurik, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Princess Eufemia of Kujavia, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Groß Prinz Alexander II. Michailowitsch Von Tver aproximadamente 1320, en Tver, Russisches Kaiserreich. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en abril de 1365, en Pskov, Pskovskiy Uyezd, Pskovskaya Guberniya, Russisches Kaiserreich.
